exercises.title: Steane Code Encoder
exercises.description: Implement the encoding circuit for the Steane code.
tasks: Start from |ψ⟩|000000⟩ (7 qubits total)
Apply initial CNOTs to create entanglement
Apply Hadamards to all qubits
Apply final CNOTs for complete encoding
Verify encoding of |0⟩, |1⟩, |+⟩, and |-⟩
hints: First CNOTs: from q0 to q3, q4, q5

exercises.title: Complete Error Correction Cycle
exercises.description: Implement syndrome measurement and error correction.
tasks: Build all 6 stabilizer operators
Implement syndrome extraction for X and Z errors
Create syndrome lookup tables
Test correction of all single X, Y, Z errors
Measure fidelity before and after correction
exercises.expectedOutput: Complete error correction with 100% success on single errors
hints: Syndrome is 3-bit binary of error location
Y error triggers both X and Z syndromes

exercises.title: Transversal Gate Verification
exercises.description: Verify that logical gates are implemented transversally.
tasks: Implement X_L = X^⊗7 and verify on logical states
Implement Z_L = Z^⊗7 and verify eigenvalues
Implement H_L = H^⊗7 and verify transformation
Implement logical CNOT between two code blocks
Verify that transversal gates preserve code space

exercises.title: Error Rate Simulation
exercises.description: Simulate the Steane code under depolarizing noise.
tasks: Implement depolarizing channel on encoded states
Simulate many rounds of error + correction
Calculate logical error rate vs physical rate
Find the threshold where Steane code helps
Compare with uncoded qubit performance
exercises.expectedOutput: Logical error rate analysis with threshold
hints: Depolarizing: apply I, X, Y, Z with probs (1-p), p/3, p/3, p/3
Logical error when 2+ physical errors occur
Threshold around p ≈ 5% where code breaks even
